LanguageData.VFE_BasicFactories.description: Construct basic factories, conveyor belts with splitters, mergers, filters and underground conveyors, as well as factory hoppers to automate certain tasks around the colony.
LanguageData.VFE_BasicFactories.label: basic factories
LanguageData.VFE_ComplexFactories.description: Construct complex, specific factories capable of manufacturing components, creating plasteel alloy and much more.
LanguageData.VFE_ComplexFactories.label: complex factories
